mapper.select: SELECT CR.CR_ID , CC_ID , TARGET_ID , CR_TITLE , CR_MAX_CNT , CREATED_AT FROM CHAT_ROOM CR INNER JOIN CHAT_MEMBER CM ON CR.CR_ID = CM.CR_ID WHERE CM.MEM_ID = #{memId} AND CR.CC_ID = 'G04001' AND CM.IS_EXITED = 'N'
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(CR_ID),0)+1 FROM CHAT_ROOM
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM( CR_ID, CC_ID, TARGET_ID , CR_TITLE, CR_MAX_CNT, CREATED_AT )VALUES( #{crId}, #{ccId}, #{targetId}, #{crTitle}, #{crMaxCnt}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO CHAT_MEMBER CM USING DUAL ON ( CM.MEM_ID = #{memId} AND CM.CR_ID = #{crId} ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CM.JOINED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP , EXITED_AT = NULL , IS_EXITED = 'N' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT VALUES(#{memId},#{crId},SYSTIMESTAMP, SYSTIMESTAMP, NULL, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT MSG_ID, CR_ID, MEM_ID , MESSAGE, SENT_AT, MESSAGE_TYPE , FILE_GROUP_ID FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE CR_ID = #{crId}

SELECT M.MSG_ID, M.CR_ID, M.MEM_ID , M.MESSAGE, M.SENT_AT, M.MESSAGE_TYPE , M.FILE_GROUP_ID FROM CHAT_MESSAGE M WHERE M.CR_ID = #{crId} AND M.SENT_AT >= (SELECT JOINED_AT FROM CHAT_MEMBER WHERE CR_ID = #{crId} AND MEM_ID = #{memId}) ORDER BY M.SENT_AT , MSG_ID
mapper.update: UPDATE CHAT_RECEIVER SET READ_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{memId} AND MSG_ID IN (SELECT MSG_ID FROM CHAT_MESSAGE WHERE CR_ID = #{crId}) AND READ_AT IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CHAT_RECEIVER WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{memId} AND READ_AT IS NULL
SELECT MEM_ID FROM CHAT_MEMBER WHERE CR_ID = #{crId} AND IS_EXITED = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) UNREAD_CNT , RECEIVER_ID FROM CHAT_RECEIVER WHERE READ_AT IS NULL GROUP BY RECEIVER_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) UNREAD_CNT , RECEIVER_ID FROM CHAT_RECEIVER WHERE RECEIVER_ID = #{memId} AND READ_AT IS NULL GROUP BY RECEIVER_ID
SELECT M.CR_ID , COUNT(*) AS UNREAD_CNT FROM CHAT_RECEIVER R JOIN CHAT_MESSAGE M ON R.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID WHERE R.RECEIVER_ID = #{memId} AND R.READ_AT IS NULL GROUP BY M.CR_ID
SELECT CR_ID , CC_ID , TARGET_ID , CR_TITLE , CR_MAX_CNT , CREATED_AT , CR_DEL_YN FROM CHAT_ROOM WHERE CR_ID = #{crId} AND CR_DEL_YN = 'N'
